data_description.name: The name used as prefix for all entities
data_description.device_id: Modbus slave address of the ventilation unit (currently only address 1 is supported)
data_description.mode: Choose whether the ventilation unit is reached over TCP/IP (Modbus TCP) or a serial port (Modbus RTU)

data.host: IP address of your modbus RTU to TCP/IP gateway

data_description.host: The IP address of your modbus RTU to TCP/IP gateway
data_description.port: The TCP port where the Modbus interface is available
data_description.scan_interval: How often the ventilation unit is polled (in seconds)

data_description.device: The serial port path the ventilation unit is connected to
data_description.baudrate: Baud rate for the serial connection (currently only 19200 is supported)
data_description.bytesize: Number of data bits per byte (currently only 8 is supported)
data_description.parity: Parity for the serial connection (currently only 'E' (even) is supported)
data_description.stopbits: Number of stop bits (currently only 1 is supported)
data_description.scan_interval: How often the ventilation unit is polled (in seconds)

data_description.control_type: How the bypass/preheater is controlled (analog 0-10V, RF, or 3-way switch)

data.host: IP address of your modbus RTU to TCP/IP gateway
data.notify_connection_errors_persistent: Show persistent notifications for connection errors

data_description.device_id: Modbus slave address of the ventilation unit (currently only address 1 is supported)
data_description.device: The serial port path the ventilation unit is connected to
data_description.baudrate: Baud rate for the serial connection (currently only 19200 is supported)
data_description.bytesize: Number of data bits per byte (currently only 8 is supported)
data_description.parity: Parity for the serial connection (currently only 'E' (even) is supported)
data_description.stopbits: Number of stop bits (currently only 1 is supported)
data_description.host: The IP address of your modbus RTU to TCP/IP gateway
data_description.port: The TCP port where the Modbus interface is available
data_description.scan_interval: How often the ventilation unit is polled (in seconds)
data_description.dewpoint_delta: Margin between the supply air dew point and the extract temperature that triggers the condensation alarm
data_description.notify_alarms_mobile: Send notifications to the notify services below
data_description.notify_alarms_persistent: Show notifications in the Home Assistant interface (persistent notifications)
data_description.notify_alarms_services: Enter notify service names separated by commas (e.g: mobile_app_iphone,mobile_app_tablet)
data_description.alarm_notification_title: The title used for alarm notifications. Default: 'ComfoAir in alarm!'
data_description.alarm_delay: Time (in seconds) to wait before sending an alarm notification. For filter warning and frost protection warning the mobile notification is only sent between 07:00-23:00; outside that window it is held until 07:00
data_description.notify_connection_errors_mobile: Send notifications to the notify services below
data_description.notify_connection_errors_persistent: Show notifications in the Home Assistant interface (persistent notifications)
data_description.notify_connection_errors_services: Enter notify service names separated by commas (e.g: mobile_app_iphone,mobile_app_tablet)
data_description.connection_error_notification_title: The title used for connection error notifications. Default: 'ComfoAir connection error!'
data_description.connection_error_delay: Time (in seconds) to wait before sending a connection error notification
